intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 85% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 3:00 at 85%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/7. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/7. 3:00 at 85%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/7. Power: 85-85%, Cadence: 90-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 19% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/7. 3:00 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/6. 85% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23% through. This is your workout. Own it. 85% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/7. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/7. 85% FTP, 85-90 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/7. 3:00 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 32% complete. Rep 3/7. 85% at 95-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 32% done. 4 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/7. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into session. 85%, 95-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/7. 28 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 85%, 88-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/7. 28 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 3 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 3:00. Then 34min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 12min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 45% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/7. 3:00 at 85%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 34 minutes of work done. 31 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5/7. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 85% × 3:00. Seated, 88-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 37 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 85%, 88-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 6/6. 85% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 85% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 6/7. 85% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 43 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 88-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 65%, Seated. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 65%, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 85% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 85% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
